Delgado Studios is a professional wedding photographer based in New York City, New York. Specializing in capturing authentic, emotional moments, Delgado Studios brings a unique artistic vision to every wedding. With 187 glowing reviews and a passion for storytelling, every image reflects the love and joy of your special day.
